articles.title: Trump says US will not lift Hormuz blockade until deal made with Iran
articles.description: The US president's comments come amid uncertainty over whether Iran will attend peace talks in Pakistan this week.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、イランとの合意までホルムズ封鎖解除せずと表明
articles.summary: トランプ米大統領は、イランとの合意が成立するまでホルムズ海峡の封鎖を解除しないと述べた。イランがパキスタンでの和平交渉に出席するか不確実な中での発言。

articles.title: New era as Apple names new boss to replace Tim Cook after 15 years
articles.description: Ternus will take over running the technology giant in September as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.
articles.titleJa: 新時代到来、アップルがティム・クック氏の後任として15年ぶりに新トップを指名
articles.summary: アップルが15年ぶりにティム・クック氏の後任として新CEOを指名した。ターナス氏が9月にテクノロジー大手アップルの経営を引き継ぐ。

articles.title: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
articles.description: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.
articles.titleJa: 日本、第二次大戦後の平和主義からの脱却として武器輸出規制を緩和
articles.summary: 日本が第二次世界大戦後の平和主義からの転換として、武器輸出規制を緩和した。これにより、十数カ国への武器売却が可能になる。

articles.title: Madonna offers reward for return of missing Coachella costume
articles.description: The items, which she says are "part of my history", disappeared after her slot with Sabrina Carpenter.
articles.titleJa: マドンナ、コーチェラで紛失した衣装の返還に報酬を提示
articles.summary: マドンナが、サブリナ・カーペンターとの出演後に紛失した「自分の歴史の一部」だというコーチェラの衣装の返還を求め、報酬を提示した。

articles.title: South Africa's police boss charged in connection with controversial health contract
articles.description: Fannie Masemola is accused of failing in his duties to provide proper oversight in his role.
articles.titleJa: 南アフリカ警察署長、論争のある医療契約に関連して起訴される
articles.summary: 南アフリカの警察署長ファニー・マセモラ氏が、論争の的となっている医療契約において適切な監督義務を怠ったとして起訴された。

articles.title: Canadian killed in shooting at Mexico's ancient Teotihuacán pyramids
articles.description: Several people were also injured in the incident on Monday at the popular tourist site, say Mexican officials, weeks before the country hosts the Fifa World Cup.
articles.titleJa: メキシコの古代遺跡テオティワカンでカナダ人観光客が銃撃され死亡
articles.summary: メキシコの古代遺跡テオティワカンで銃撃事件が発生し、カナダ人観光客1名が死亡、数名が負傷。FIFAワールドカップ開催を数週間後に控えた人気観光地での事件。

articles.title: The Onion launches new effort to turn Infowars into parody website
articles.description: The new proposal would involve the publication licensing Alex Jones's company, which faces liquidation.
articles.titleJa: ジ・オニオン、インフォウォーズをパロディサイトに変える新たな取り組みを開始
articles.summary: ジ・オニオンが、破産手続き中のアレックス・ジョーンズ氏の会社をライセンス供与し、インフォウォーズをパロディサイトに転換する新たな計画を提案した。

articles.title: US singer D4vd pleads not guilty to murder in death of missing teen girl
articles.description: Prosecutors say the singer, real name David Anthony Burke, could face life in prison due to the nature of the case, if convicted.
articles.titleJa: 米歌手D4vd、行方不明の少女死亡事件で殺人の罪を否認
articles.summary: 米国の歌手D4vd（本名デイヴィッド・アンソニー・バーク）が、行方不明になっていたティーンエイジャーの少女の死に関与した殺人罪で無罪を主張した。

articles.title: Outrage over Israeli soldier's vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
articles.description: The Israeli military says it views with "great severity" the actions of the soldier, as the US ambassador demands "swift" consequences.
articles.titleJa: レバノンでのイスラエル兵によるイエス像破壊に激怒
articles.summary: レバノンでイスラエル兵がイエス像を破壊したことに激しい怒りが広がっている。イスラエル軍は兵士の行動を「極めて深刻」とみなし、米国大使は迅速な対処を要求した。

articles.title: Japan on high alert for 'huge' second quake after lifting tsunami warning
articles.description: Japan's meteorological agency warns another, stronger earthquake may hit in the next week.
articles.titleJa: 日本、津波警報解除後も「巨大」な第二の地震に厳戒態勢
articles.summary: 日本が津波警報を解除したものの、気象庁は今後1週間以内にさらに強い地震が発生する可能性があると警告し、厳戒態勢を敷いている。

articles.title: Hungary: Orban-era LGBTQ law infringes human rights, ECJ rules
articles.description: The EU's top court has found that Hungary's 2021 laws on issues including transgender and homosexual identity and sex offenses breach various EU laws. This includes Article 2 of EU Treaty, to protect human dignity.
articles.titleJa: ハンガリー：オルバン政権時代のLGBTQ法が人権侵害とECJが判決
articles.summary: EU司法裁判所は、ハンガリーのLGBTQ関連法が人権を侵害しているとの判決を下した。この法律はEU条約第2条に違反している。

articles.title: Why the cloud still runs on coal and gas
articles.description: Renewable energy is increasingly being used to supply power-hungry data centers. As the sector swells, much of the electricity demand is being met by polluting fossil fuels.
articles.titleJa: なぜクラウドは依然として石炭とガスで動いているのか
articles.summary: 電力消費の多いデータセンターへの再生可能エネルギー供給が増加する一方で、部門の拡大に伴い、多くの電力需要が汚染度の高い化石燃料で満たされている現状を指摘。

articles.title: Japan loosens long-standing curbs on arms exports
articles.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi approved new rules expanding Japan's ability to export advanced defense equipment, a major shift as Tokyo boosts defense spending and its arms industry.
articles.titleJa: 日本、長年の武器輸出規制を緩和
articles.summary: 高市早苗首相は、日本の先進防衛装備品の輸出能力を拡大する新規則を承認。これは防衛費増強と兵器産業強化に向けた大きな政策転換となる。

articles.title: Germany news: Trial starts in Istanbul over tourist deaths
articles.description: Six people have been charged with negligent homicide over the deaths of four members of a German family at a hotel in Turkey. Meanwhile, a major climate conference is starting in Berlin. DW has more.
articles.titleJa: ドイツニュース：イスタンブールで観光客死亡事件の裁判開始
articles.summary: トルコのホテルでドイツ人家族4人が死亡した事件で、過失致死罪で6人が起訴され、イスタンブールで裁判が始まった。一方、ベルリンでは主要な気候変動会議も開催中。

articles.title: India news: India-US near trade deal in Washington
articles.description: US officials say an agreement is nearing completion as negotiations resume. Meanwhile, videos of violence inside a German gurudwara are causing a stir in India. Follow live.
articles.titleJa: インドニュース：印米、ワシントンで貿易協定締結間近
articles.summary: 米国当局は、インドと米国の貿易交渉が再開され、協定が締結間近であると発表した。一方、ドイツのグルドワラでの暴力映像がインドで波紋を呼んでいる。

articles.title: South Korea: Police seek to arrest BTS agency chief over fraud allegations
articles.description: Police say HYBE chief Bang Si-hyuk secretly made millions from post-IPO share sales. The case comes as K-pop supergroup BTS embarks on a global tour.

articles.title: Rat poison found in baby food, extortion suspected
articles.description: Rat poison has been found in HiPP baby food jars across Austria, Czechia and Slovakia in what authorities suspect is a blackmail attempt.
articles.titleJa: ベビーフードから殺鼠剤、恐喝の疑い
articles.summary: オーストリア、チェコ、スロバキアのHiPPベビーフード瓶から殺鼠剤が発見され、当局は恐喝未遂事件として捜査している。公衆衛生上の懸念が高まっている。

articles.title: Iran war: Talks in doubt as leaders issue threats
articles.description: While the talks remain in limbo, the United States and Iran have been trading threats. Separately, media reports suggest US Vice President JD Vance is set to travel to Pakistan for ceasefire negotiations. DW has more.
articles.titleJa: イラン戦争：指導者らが威嚇、交渉は不確実
articles.summary: イランと米国の間の交渉が不確実な中、両国の指導者らは威嚇を応酬している。米国副大統領は停戦交渉のためパキスタンへ向かう予定。

articles.title: FAA grounds Blue Origin's New Glenn after orbital setback
articles.description: US aviation regulators have ordered Blue Origin, a space company owned by billionaire Jeff Bezos, to investigate a malfunction in the upper stage of its New Glenn rocket.
articles.titleJa: FAA、軌道上での問題を受けブルーオリジンのニューグレンを運航停止
articles.summary: 米航空当局は、ジェフ・ベゾス氏所有の宇宙企業ブルーオリジンに対し、ニューグレンロケットの上段の不具合を調査するよう命じ、その運航を停止させた。

articles.title: Amnesty International paints a grim picture
articles.description: In its 2025/2026 report, the human rights watchdog Amnesty International calls out the "predatory behavior of the powerful" and calls for action to defend the global order.
articles.titleJa: アムネスティ・インターナショナルが厳しい現状を描写
articles.summary: アムネスティ・インターナショナルは2025/2026年報告書で「強者の略奪的行為」を非難し、国際秩序を守るための行動を求めた。人権状況の深刻な悪化が浮き彫りに。

articles.title: Charlize Theron joins chorus of disapproval over Timothée Chalamet’s ballet comments
articles.description:
The former ballet dancer said Chalamet’s comments were ‘reckless’ in an interview with the New York Times in which she also discussed her violent childhood
Actor and former ballet dancer Charlize Theron has joined the chorus of disapproval aimed at Timothée Chalamet over his remarks that appeared to disrespect performers of ballet and opera.
In an interview with the New York Times, Theron said: “Oh, boy, I hope I run into him one day,” adding: “That was a very reckless comment on two art forms that we need to lift up constantly because, yes, they do have a hard time. But in 10 years, AI is going to be able to do Timothée’s job, but it will not be able to replace a person on a stage dancing live.”
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: シャーリーズ・セロン、ティモシー・シャラメのバレエに関する発言に不満の声に加わる
articles.summary: 女優シャーリーズ・セロンが、ティモシー・シャラメのバレエやオペラに関する軽率な発言を非難した。彼女は、AIが俳優の仕事を代替しても、ライブパフォーマンスは代替できないと述べた。

articles.title: Arrests fuel fears among Madagascar’s gen Z protesters that new regime no better than one they overthrew
articles.description:
Jubilation is turning to disenchantment as young activists arrested after protest calling for election date to be set
The arrest of several protesters in Madagascar has increased fears among young people that the military regime that took power last year after huge Gen Z demonstrations will be no better than the government it overthrew.
Four Gen Z activists, Herizo Andriamanantena, Miora Rakotomalala, Dina Randrianarisoa and Nomena Ratsihorimanana, were arrested on 12 April, one of their lawyers said, two days after taking part in a protest calling for an election date to be set.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: マダガスカルのZ世代抗議者、逮捕で新政権が倒した政権より良くないとの懸念募る
articles.summary: マダガスカルで選挙日設定を求める抗議活動後、Z世代の活動家が逮捕され、若者の間で昨年クーデターで誕生した新政権が前政権より良くないとの懸念が高まっている。

articles.title: Iranian American woman arrested in Los Angeles for alleged arms trafficking
articles.description:
Federal prosecutor says woman is suspected of dealing weapons to Africa on behalf of Iranian government
A California woman was arrested at Los Angeles international airport after allegedly trafficking weapons on behalf of the Iranian government to contacts in Africa, including Sudan.
Shamim Mafi, 44, of Woodland Hills was detained on Saturday night by federal agents, according to the top federal prosecutor in Los Angeles.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ロサンゼルスでイラン系アメリカ人女性が武器密輸容疑で逮捕
articles.summary: ロサンゼルス国際空港で、イラン系アメリカ人女性がイラン政府のためにアフリカへ武器を密輸した疑いで連邦捜査官に逮捕された。

articles.title: Kenyan firm sacks more than 1,000 workers after losing Meta contract
articles.description:
Meta paused work with Sama last month after allegations about staff viewing private scenes filmed by smart glasses
More than 1,000 low-paid workers in Kenya have been abruptly sacked by an outsourcing company contracted by Meta, in what activists said was a shocking move exposing the precariousness of tech jobs in the global south.
Sama, a company based in Nairobi to which Meta outsourced content moderation and AI training work, announced on Thursday that the workers were being laid off after Meta terminated a contract.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ケニア企業、Metaとの契約喪失後1,000人以上の従業員を解雇
articles.summary: ケニアのアウトソーシング企業SamaがMetaとの契約終了により、1,000人以上の低賃金労働者を突然解雇した。これはテクノロジー業界の不安定な雇用状況を露呈している。

articles.title: Weather tracker: hail covers parts of Tunisia and Algeria like snow
articles.description:
Accumulations of up to 3cm deep reported as severe thunderstorms also bring heavy downpours to central Italy
Severe thunderstorms have affected the Mediterranean this week. On Monday, a surface low-pressure system in the Mediterranean in conjunction with an upper air cut-off low, led to thunderstorms over north Africa. Their intensity was aided by the hot precursor conditions.
Algeria and Tunisia were notably affected by the thunderstorms, with some hail accumulation layers as a result. When so much hail forms, it starts to lay down sheets of hail, covering the ground like snow. Hail accumulations of up to 3cm were reported in Oum Ladjoul and Hammam Sokhna in Algeria, and there were hailstones of up to 3cm in diameter in Makthar, Tunisia. Thunderstorms continued in the region through the following day, with further hail accumulations, notably in Ouled Bousmir, Tunisia, where there was a layer about 2cm deep.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 気象トラッカー：チュニジアとアルジェリアの一部で雪のように雹が積もる
articles.summary: 地中海地域で発生した激しい雷雨により、チュニジアとアルジェリアの一部で最大3cmの雹が積もり、地面が雪で覆われたような光景となった。

articles.title: Canadian woman killed after gunman opens fire at Mexico’s Teotihuacán pyramids
articles.description:
At least four more injured at world heritage site in latest violent incident as country prepares to co-host World Cup
One Canadian tourist has been killed and six other people were wounded by gunfire after an armed man opened fire at one of Mexico’s most famous tourist destinations, the Teotihuacán pyramids near Mexico City.
The shooting – the latest violent incident to affect Mexico as it prepares to co-host the football World Cup in June – took place on Monday lunchtime and was captured in mobile phone videos.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: メキシコのテオティワカン・ピラミッドで銃撃、カナダ人女性が死亡
articles.summary: メキシコの世界遺産テオティワカン・ピラミッドで銃撃事件が発生し、カナダ人観光客1人が死亡、6人が負傷した。これは同国での暴力事件の最新のものである。

articles.title: Carney says Canada’s strong economic ties to US are ‘weakness’ to be corrected
articles.description:
Prime minister details efforts to attract investment and sign trade deals with other countries in 10-minute video address
Canada’s strong economic ties to the United States were once a strength but are now a weakness that must be corrected, the country’s prime minister has warned.
In a 10-minute video address, Mark Carney spoke about his government’s efforts to strengthen the Canadian economy by attracting new investments and signing trade deals with other countries.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: カーニー首相、カナダの米国への強い経済的結びつきは「弱点」であり修正すべきと発言
articles.summary: カナダのマーク・カーニー首相は、米国への強い経済的依存はもはや弱点であり、他国との貿易協定や投資誘致を通じて経済を強化する必要があると述べた。

articles.title: US and Mexican officials assigned to cartel case killed in car accident
articles.description:
Director of state investigation agency among those killed in Chihuahua in operation to destroy clandestine drug labs
Two United States officials and another two Mexican officials assigned to combat drug cartel operations died in a car accident in the northern Mexican state of Chihuahua on Sunday, a US embassy spokesperson said.
The Mexican officials were the director of the state’s investigation agency and an officer, state authorities said, adding that they were on an operation to destroy clandestine laboratories in the municipality of Morelos.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 麻薬カルテル事件担当の米国およびメキシコ当局者が交通事故で死亡
articles.summary: メキシコ北部チワワ州で、麻薬カルテル対策作戦中に米国およびメキシコの当局者計4名が交通事故で死亡した。彼らは隠し麻薬研究所の破壊任務にあたっていた。

articles.title: Canadian astronaut’s bon mots help heal wounds from French language row
articles.description:
Jeremy Hansen praised for speaking French in space after Air Canada chief’s linguistic snub exposed tensions and drew rebuke from PM
Few people foresaw humanity’s quest for the moon as accurately as the 19th-century French author Jules Verne, whose two works –From the Earth to the Moon and Around the Moon – anticipated many of the features of modern lunar exploration.
But Verne’s language had never been spoken in deep space until the Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen uttered four words during Nasa’s recent Artemis II mission.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: カナダ人宇宙飛行士の機転の利いた発言が、フランス語論争の傷を癒す
articles.summary: カナダ人宇宙飛行士ジェレミー・ハンセンが宇宙でフランス語を話したことで、エア・カナダCEOの言語的軽視が引き起こしたフランス語をめぐる緊張が和らいだと称賛された。

articles.title: Venezuela’s Machado to hold Madrid rally as opposition frozen out after Maduro capture
articles.description:
Exiled leader to revive push for change amid US backing of Delcy Rodríguez and delays to democratic transition
Venezuela’s opposition leader, María Corina Machado, will seek to revive her push for political change with a rally in Madrid on Saturday, having found herself sidelined by Donald Trump after the abduction of the president Nicolás Maduro.
“Venezuela will be free,” the Nobel peace prize winner insisted in an interview on the eve of this weekend’s demonstration in the Puerta del Sol square, which is expected to draw tens of thousands of protesters.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: The Iran war's biggest 'losers' are now 2026's top-performing markets
articles.description: The stock markets that were supposed to pay the highest price for the Iran war are now the ones leading the 2026 league table, and the rebound from March's Hormuz panic has been one of the most aggressive relief rallies in years.

articles.summary: イラン戦争の代償を払うはずだった株式市場が、2026年の市場をリードしている。3月のホルムズ海峡パニックからの回復は、近年でも最も積極的なものの一つだ。

articles.title: Dozens of Turkish coal miners detained after march for unpaid wages
articles.description: Some 110 Doruk Madencilik workers who had been marching to Ankara to demand unpaid wages and compensation were detained as demands for rights and safety grow louder.
articles.titleJa: 未払い賃金を求めたデモ、トルコ炭鉱労働者数十人が拘束される

articles.title: EU optimistic about ending Hungary's veto on €90 billion loan for Ukraine
articles.description: Brussels is ready to move on with the €90 billion loan for Ukraine as soon as Hungary removes its controversial veto. The resolution could also pave the way for the adoption of a new package of sanctions against Russia.

articles.title: BTS agency chairman Bang Si-Hyuk faces arrest over alleged fraud scheme

articles.title: One of the world’s longest pedestrian bridges just opened in Helsinki
articles.description: Spanning 1,191 metres, Kruunuvuorensilta bridge in Finland connects Korkeasaari and Kruunuvuorenranta.

articles.title: Global markets on edge as investors await outcome of US-Iran negotiations
articles.description: European markets are trading mostly flat with Asian indices jumping higher and oil prices rising slightly as suspense builds around potential US-Iran negotiations and the end of the ceasefire in less than 48 hours.

articles.title: Gut microbiome may predict Parkinson’s risk years before symptoms, study finds
articles.description: Scientists have found that distinctive patterns in gut bacteria can identify people at risk of developing Parkinson’s disease years before symptoms appear.
articles.titleJa: 腸内細菌叢、症状出現の数年前にパーキンソン病リスクを予測か、研究で判明
